chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 359 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to non-prosecution of reference application. 17.11.2025 Dr. Shah Nawaz Memon, advocate for the applicant. This reference application is pending since 2018. On 08.03.2021, notice was ordered to be issued, however, matter remains listed for orders as to non-prosecution. Even today, learned counsel articulates no reason as to why notice could not be issued. The matter has clogged the docket for seven years and there is no apparent reason to sustain the same. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
